title: Lead Revenue Manager at Sodexo India

jsonLd.title: Lead Revenue Manager at Sodexo India
jsonLd.description:
Sodexo India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Revenue Manager to join our dynamic team in Noida. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Sodexo India:
Sodexo India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in HACCP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sodexo India!
